questionHtml: The diameter at Y is made smaller than that at X. Explain why the pressure difference between X and Y will increase.
markschemeHtml:
the fluid speed at Y will be greater «than that at X» ✔

reducing the pressure at Y
OR
the formula used to show that the difference is increased ✔
